folkens-auto-buff-pf1.settings.autoMatch: When an item, spell, or feature is used, automatically activate buffs whose name starts with the item's name (at a word boundary).
folkens-auto-buff-pf1.settings.targetMod: Whose buffs get activated when an item is used.
Targeted token(s) if any, else the user
folkens-auto-buff-pf1.settings.minNameLe: Item names shorter than this (after normalization) never auto-match, preventing junk matches.
folkens-auto-buff-pf1.settings.broadcast: When you turn a buff on for one of several selected tokens, copy + activate that buff on the other selected tokens.
Also mirror turning a buff OFF to the other selected tokens (does not copy — only toggles buffs they already have).
